name: Pumpkin Seed Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the bread into small pieces.
2. Cook the pumpkin seeds, onion, bread, and garlic in oil over medium heat, stirring frequently until the bread turns golden brown.
3. Add the chopped green chiles to the mixture and stir well.
4. Transfer the mixture to a food processor with steel blades. Cover and process until smooth.
5. Stir in the chicken broth, whipping cream, and salt until combined.
6. Alternatively, combine pumpkin seed mixture and about half of the broth in a blender container. Blend until smooth.
7. Add the remaining broth, whipping cream, and salt to the blended mixture.
8. Makes about 3 cups of sauce.
